conflict: Deepfake-triggered mobilization and crackdown generate chaos while communication channels collapse.
consequence: Civilian deaths, Minjae's sister's disappearance, and a planted narrative naming Ina as foreign agent harden the story's cost.
must_land_beats: Mercury payload activates through synchronized hacked feeds.
Border fear causes panic movements and preventable casualties.
Minjae learns his sister is missing after a neighborhood sweep.
Ina is publicly framed and cannot safely rebut in real time.
objective: Survive Mercury Night fallout and assess losses.
